summaryPatterns: I'm a C#/.NET Backend Developer with 3+ years of experience building high-load systems for e-commerce and fintech. Optimized API response times from 800ms to 150ms serving 50,000+ concurrent users.
Backend Developer (4+ years) specializing in ASP.NET Core microservices and PostgreSQL optimization. Reduced query execution time from 1.2s to 250ms on 2M+ record datasets.
I'm a C# developer with 8+ years of experience in enterprise systems. Built CRM modules serving 10+ person teams and automated report generation saving 1,000+ hours monthly.
Senior .NET Developer (5+ years) focused on distributed systems architecture. Migrated monolith to microservices reducing infrastructure costs by 40% and improving system stability.
achievementPhrases: Reduced API response time from 800ms to 150ms using Redis caching
Optimized query execution from 1.2s to 250ms on 2M+ record datasets
Decreased registration time from 5 seconds to 50ms with user optimization
Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% through microservices migration
Automated report generation saving 1,000+ hours monthly
Improved system performance by 33% through route optimization
Reduced diagnostic time from 2-3 hours to 15 minutes with centralized logging
Achieved 99.7% SLA by fixing 100+ critical bugs
Decreased processing time from 45 to 8 minutes for 50,000 records
Reduced database load by 37% through Redis caching implementation
Accelerated data analysis 6x faster with spatial partitioning algorithms
Cut manual operations by 60% with automated placement algorithms
Improved load balancing efficiency by 18% using dynamic distribution
Reduced memory consumption by 40% migrating from FastReport to SpreadCheetah
Processed 500+ MB archives 33% faster (from 60 to 40 minutes)
Handled 200M+ telemetry records with PostgreSQL partitioning
Served 50,000+ concurrent Black Friday orders with sub-200ms response
Increased test coverage from 70% to 83% reducing production bugs to zero
keyResponsibilities: Develop and maintain ASP.NET Core Web APIs and microservices
Design and optimize PostgreSQL/MS SQL database schemas and queries
Build real-time communication features with SignalR
Create automated background services and scheduled tasks
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Perform code reviews and maintain coding standards
Integrate with external APIs and third-party services
Deploy applications using Docker and CI/CD pipelines
redFlags: Отсутствие конкретных метрик и цифр в достижениях
Указание только теоретических знаний без практического опыта
Размытые формулировки обязанностей без технических деталей
Отсутствие примеров работы с высокими нагрузками
notes: Сильное резюме C#/.NET разработчика должно демонстрировать опыт работы с современным стеком (.NET 6+, ASP.NET Core) и enterprise-подходами. Обязательны конкретные метрики производительности, размеры нагрузок и команд. Важно показать понимание архитектурных паттернов (CQRS, DDD, микросервисы) и опыт оптимизации систем под высокие нагрузки. Резюме должно содержать примеры работы с очередями сообщений, кешированием, мониторингом и современными DevOps-практиками. Ценится опыт миграции legacy-систем, автоматизации бизнес-процессов и работы в кросс-функциональных командах по Agile-методологиям.
